overview: An ATS-friendly resume builder where users log in, fill out their resume with a live side-by-side preview, and export a clean PDF optimized for job applications.
features: Login with Internet Identity to save and resume editing across sessions
Live side-by-side preview — see your resume update as you type
Structured sections: contact info, summary, work experience, education, and skills
Skills managed as add/remove tag badges
One-click PDF export with clean black-and-white ATS-optimized layout
Default ATS template applied immediately — no setup required
